evals.name: warns-at-60-pct-context
evals.prompt: Invoke hooks/UserPromptSubmit-session-degradation-watch.sh with input JSON pointing transcript_path to skills/session-degradation-watch/evals/fixtures/transcript-60pct.jsonl. Save the hook's stdout to hook-out-60.json. The hook must emit a hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext mentioning context % and suggesting handoff WRITE.
assertions: additionalContext contains 'handoff' (suggests handoff WRITE as the action)
additionalContext contains '60%' OR '60 %' OR 'context' (names the signal)

evals.name: force-at-85-pct
evals.prompt: Invoke the hook with transcript_path = transcript-85pct.jsonl. Save stdout to hook-out-85.json. The hook must emit a stronger message — 'call handoff NOW' or equivalent urgency wording.
assertions: additionalContext contains '85' OR '85%' OR 'force' OR 'NOW' OR 'immediately' (escalated urgency vs 60% case)

evals.name: repeated-tool-call-detected
evals.prompt: Invoke the hook with transcript_path = transcript-repeated-bash.jsonl (3 identical 'ls -la' calls in last 5 turns). Save stdout to hook-out-repeated.json. The hook must flag the loop.
assertions: additionalContext contains 'repeated' OR 'loop' OR 'identical' OR 'ls -la' (names the repeat)
additionalContext contains 'different' OR 'try' OR 'approach' (suggests trying something different)

evals.name: stale-read-detected
evals.prompt: Invoke the hook with transcript_path = transcript-stale-read.jsonl (Edit on src/a.ts at turn 21, last Read of src/a.ts at turn 2 → 19-turn gap, exceeds 15-turn threshold). Save stdout to hook-out-stale.json. The hook must suggest re-Read.

evals.name: contradiction-flagged
evals.prompt: Create a fixture .claude/PROJECT_STATE.md with the line 'Decision: use JWT not session cookies'. Then invoke the hook with a transcript ending in a turn saying 'using session cookies for auth'. The hook must detect the string-level contradiction (decision says JWT, current direction says cookies) and flag it.

files.content: Decision: use JWT not session cookies for auth.

assertions: additionalContext mentions 'JWT' OR 'session cookies' (names the contradicting concept)

evals.name: no-noise-on-clean-session
evals.prompt: Invoke the hook with transcript_path = transcript-clean.jsonl (small transcript, no signals). The hook must NOT emit any additionalContext OR must emit an empty/null additionalContext. False positives here are a release-blocking regression.
assertions: hook-out-clean.json does NOT contain additionalContext OR additionalContext is empty string OR null
no hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext field present OR it's an empty string
